name: no-hardcoded-secrets
assertion: The agent must never hardcode Mailcow or SMTP2GO passwords or API keys in code.

name: use-env
assertion: The agent must read email configuration dynamically from process.env.

name: env-check-never-prints-values
assertion: node .agent/skills/email/scripts/check-email-env.mjs exits 0 and its output contains env var NAMES with set/unset markers only — never a credential value.

name: droplet-env-is-source-of-truth
assertion: Before debugging any 'email broken' report, the agent verifies env presence on the droplet (/opt/portfolio-site/.env, names only) rather than concluding from the sparse local .env.
